title: UI Groups Management Flow
activity_flow: START: ctxmenu-will-open event fires on window
GUARD: event.detail.options.id !== 'user-options-menu' → EXIT (do nothing)
GUARD: !window.experimental_features → EXIT (do nothing)
BUILD: construct newMenuItems array with 'Groups Manager' item
FIND: locate 'task_manager' item index in items array
BRANCH: task_manager found? → insert after it; not found → append to end
INJECT: set event.detail.options.items = [...firstHalf, ...newMenuItems, ...secondHalf]
USER ACTION: click 'Groups Manager' menu item
CREATE: new UIGroupsManager()
CALL: groupsManager.open_as_window()
CALL: UIElement.open_as_window() creates Placeholder and window
CALL: make({ root }) is invoked (UIElement base calls make() if not LAZY_RENDER)
RENDER: append alpha-warning div to root
BUILD: new Collector({ antiCSRF: window.services.get('anti-csrf'), origin: window.api_origin, authToken: puter.authToken })
FETCH: await collector.get('/group/list') → GET request with Bearer token
RECEIVE: response.in_groups array
LOOP: for each group in in_groups
READ: group.metadata.title (fallback: group.uid)
READ: group.metadata.color (fallback: '#FFF')
BUILD: el('div.group', [el('div.group-name', { text: title })])
APPLY: group_el.style.backgroundColor = color (if color defined)
END LOOP
RENDER: append groups_el container to root
END
key_conditions: window.experimental_features must be truthy to inject menu item
group.metadata may be absent → fallback to group.uid for title
group.metadata.color may be absent → fallback to '#FFF'
task_manager item position determines insert index (insertBeforeIndex = foundIndex + 1)
key_relationships: UIElement.open_as_window() wraps make() in a modal window
Extension hooks into global jQuery ctxmenu-will-open event
method_signatures: Collector.fetch({ method, route, body?, no_response? }): async JSON
api_endpoints: GET /group/list → returns { in_groups: [{ uid, metadata?: { title, color } }] }
data_structures: group: { uid: string, metadata?: { title?: string, color?: string } }
newMenuItems: [{ id: 'groups-manager', html: 'Groups Manager', action: Function }]
important_notes: Feature is gated behind window.experimental_features flag. Menu item is injected after 'task_manager' in the user-options-menu context menu. Collector adds anti-CSRF token for POST requests but GET /group/list has no CSRF concern. UIElement constructor auto-calls make() unless LAZY_RENDER is set.
